description: Integrate ActivitySuggestionBridge into orchestrator main loop

integration_points.action: Add activity suggestion based on metastate

graceful_fallbacks: If activity_integration_bridge import fails: skip activity suggestions
If no capabilities found: return empty list, continue without suggestions
If zenity unavailable: skip question queue processing
If journal unavailable: skip mark integration
testing_criteria: No errors when capability_registry.json doesn't exist
Activity suggestions gracefully skipped when disabled
Journal marks only added if journal system available
